---
title: "cv"
pagetitle: "CV — vlad chituc"
---

<a href="assets/Chituc-CV.pdf" class="cv-download" download>↓ download cv (pdf)</a>

<object data="assets/Chituc-CV.pdf" type="application/pdf" class="cv-embed">
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs. <a href="assets/Chituc-CV.pdf">Download the CV here</a>.</p>
</object>
